backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining an esports backend with in-memory maps for announcements and roster members, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both entities.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three completed UI features (roster heading change, news CTA button text change, gun animation removal) to their affected source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a build-planning reference for the project's components, hooks, pages, and assets.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet that defines OKLCH CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, primary, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA, including viewport meta tags, theme color, Web App Manifest link, favicon references, and a service worker registration script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, display mode, theme/background colors, icon paths, and Urdu language setting for standalone installation.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first with background-refresh strategy for same-origin GET requests, with offline fallback to index.html for navigation requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the top-level application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel with red overlay, and a four-card values grid (Discipline, Excellence, Victory, Brotherhood).
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: A collapsible floating admin panel component that allows authenticated users to add, edit, and delete roster members and announcements via React Query mutations. It manages separate form states for roster and news tabs with loading indicators.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: A card component that displays a single announcement with its title, body, and formatted timestamp (converted from ICP nanoseconds). Includes hover animations and a 'Read More' indicator.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A site footer component rendering brand identity, quick navigation links, social media icons (YouTube, Instagram, Facebook), and contact information for Legend X Arena.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: A full-screen hero section with a background image, gradient overlays, the Legend X Arena logo and title, a tagline, and CTA buttons linking to the roster and news sections.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: A fixed navigation bar that becomes opaque with a backdrop blur on scroll, containing the brand logo, desktop nav links, a CTA button, and a mobile hamburger menu with animated toggle.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: A news section that fetches and displays announcements in a responsive grid using AnnouncementCard components, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states handled separately.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Renders a styled card for a single roster member showing their avatar, name, and role with hover effects and a fallback default image.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: Displays a fixed top banner prompting users to install the app as a PWA, handling the `beforeinstallprompt` event for Android and showing manual instructions for iOS Safari.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Fetches and displays the team roster as a grid of PlayerCards, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states handled.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for the dark esports theme, and utility classes for glow effects, metallic text, and clip-path shapes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the landing page by rendering Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (including an esports palette), shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations. Enables dark mode via class, and includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state at schema version 1.0.0 (version 9), listing all implemented frontend features by ID, title, and associated requirement IDs. Serves as a build-planning reference for completed and pending feature work.
